description: Fixed, reusable 18-task business discovery benchmark set, replacing the N=1/N=2 methodology weakness of E10/E21/E21c. Every ground_truth_entities entry was verified via live WebSearch against a real, cited source URL -- not LLM-generated without verification (see TASK_SET_README.md for the verification method and per-task confidence notes).

ground_truth_entities.name: Naturehike
ground_truth_entities.notes: Headquarters location not stated on official About page -- not part of the verified ground truth.

intent.industry: cloud native / open source software foundation

ground_truth_entities.name: Cloud Native Computing Foundation
ground_truth_entities.notes: CNCF is a subsidiary of the Linux Foundation; founding year (2015) is medium-confidence, sourced from Wikipedia not the official site directly.

ground_truth_entities.name: Advantech Co., Ltd.
ground_truth_entities.notes: Founded 1983 (verified via official site footer copyright notice). No general inquiry email confirmed on official page -- only phone/contact form.

ground_truth_entities.name: Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF)
ground_truth_entities.notes: Headquartered in Basel, Switzerland. Established June 2014 by the Financial Stability Board (exact date medium-confidence, sourced from a third-party LEI industry knowledge base).

ground_truth_entities.name: ASUSTeK Computer Inc.
ground_truth_entities.notes: TWSE:2357. "ASUS" is the consumer brand name; "ASUSTeK Computer Inc." is the registered legal/investor-relations name.

ground_truth_entities.name: Acer Incorporated
ground_truth_entities.notes: TWSE:2353. Official IR pages use "Acer Incorporated"; "Acer Inc." is a common shorthand for the same entity, not a different company.

ground_truth_entities.name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (Foxconn)
ground_truth_entities.notes: TWSE:2317. "Foxconn" is a trading/brand name (Foxconn Technology Group internationally, Hon Hai Technology Group in Taiwan) for the same legal entity, not a separate company.

ground_truth_entities.name: Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd.
ground_truth_entities.notes: TWSE:2412, NYSE ADS: CHT. Trap for negative-keyword testing: do NOT confuse with mainland China Telecom (中国电信), a distinct unrelated entity with a similar-sounding name.

ground_truth_entities.name: Delta Electronics, Inc.
ground_truth_entities.notes: TWSE:2308. Trap: do not conflate with the separately SET-listed subsidiary "Delta Electronics (Thailand) PCL," a related but distinct legal entity.

ground_truth_entities.name: Google
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding/platinum member at 2015 launch

ground_truth_entities.name: Cisco
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding/platinum member at 2015 launch

ground_truth_entities.name: IBM
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding/platinum member at 2015 launch

ground_truth_entities.name: Red Hat
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding/platinum member at 2015 launch

ground_truth_entities.name: Docker
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding member at 2015 launch

ground_truth_entities.name: Huawei
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Founding/platinum member at 2015 launch

tasks.notes: Same topic E21c tested and got P=R=F1=0.000 on -- included deliberately for before/after comparability. Broader founding roster (CoreOS, Mesosphere, Intel, Joyent, Twitter, VMware, AT&T, NetApp, Fujitsu) also exists if more matches are found.

ground_truth_entities.name: Apple
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Largest customer by revenue share; reserves most advanced nodes

ground_truth_entities.name: Nvidia
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Major AI GPU customer, reportedly overtaking Apple as largest customer in 2025-2026

ground_truth_entities.name: AMD
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Advanced-node CPU/GPU customer, early 2nm allocation

ground_truth_entities.name: MediaTek
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Flagship mobile SoC customer, early 2nm allocation

ground_truth_entities.name: Qualcomm
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Major customer reserving advanced-node capacity (~8% of estimated 2026 revenue per analysts)

tasks.notes: TSMC does not publish a customer-revenue table directly; customer identities confirmed via reputable tech press reporting on TSMC statements/node bookings. Precise revenue percentages are analyst estimates, not TSMC-disclosed -- do not require an agent under test to reproduce exact percentages, only customer identity.

ground_truth_entities.name: Naturehike.de (operated by Walthaus Outdoor)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Appears to be the branded German-market storefront/distributor

ground_truth_entities.name: ARTS-Outdoors
ground_truth_entities.relationship: German online retailer with a dedicated Naturehike shop-in-shop

ground_truth_entities.name: Amazon.de Naturehike storefront
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Official-looking Naturehike brand store on Amazon Germany

tasks.notes: DELIBERATELY LOW-CONFIDENCE / THIN-EVIDENCE TASK. No official Naturehike press release, company announcement, or "find a retailer" page naming exclusive/authorized DACH distributors was found -- only retailer/marketplace listings. No distinct Austrian retailer found at all; Swiss retailers (Galaxus.ch, Outdoor Station, Camperreich) stock products but show no evidence of formal distributor status, so they are NOT included in ground truth. This task is included on purpose: it tests whether an agent under test also honestly reports thin/uncertain findings rather than hallucinating a confident-looking distributor list. This is the same real-world theme as E10/E21's Naturehike DACH dogfood task -- included for direct comparability, not coincidence.

ground_truth_entities.name: Xiaomi
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Documented Dimensity chipset adoption; joint MediaTek-Xiaomi lab

ground_truth_entities.name: Oppo
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Confirmed Dimensity 9000/flagship adoption, Dimensity AI Pioneer Program

ground_truth_entities.name: Vivo
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Confirmed Dimensity chipset adoption across multiple generations

ground_truth_entities.name: Honor
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Confirmed Dimensity 9000 adoption / AI Pioneer Program member

ground_truth_entities.name: Samsung
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Dimensity chipsets in Galaxy A-series/Tab S11/S12; Samsung validated LPDDR5X for MediaTek's flagship platform

ground_truth_entities.name: Financial Stability Board (FSB)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Directed by G20 in 2011 to develop the global LEI system; originator of the LEI initiative

ground_truth_entities.name: LEI Regulatory Oversight Committee (LEI ROC)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Formal oversight body of 70+ public authorities/regulators from 50+ jurisdictions overseeing GLEIF; signed MoU with GLEIF Oct 2015

ground_truth_entities.name: ISO (International Organization for Standardization)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Publishes ISO 17442-1, the technical standard defining LEI code structure that GLEIF implements

ground_truth_entities.name: U.S. Office of Financial Research (OFR)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: U.S. Treasury body maintaining an official public LEI lookup tool integrating GLEIF's Global LEI System data

tasks.notes: Same domain as E23 (entity resolution via GLEIF+Wikidata) -- included for thematic continuity with prior experiments.

ground_truth_entities.name: Microsoft Azure
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Microsoft CSP partner; UNO edge gateways certified in Azure IoT device catalogue; joint work on Azure IoT Operations

ground_truth_entities.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
ground_truth_entities.relationship: Edge gateways qualified for AWS IoT Greengrass; Edge Service Packages bundle Azure IoT Edge + AWS IoT Greengrass support

ground_truth_entities.name: Alibaba Cloud
ground_truth_entities.relationship: WISE-PaaS/EnSaaS cross-cloud management explicitly supports Alibaba Cloud alongside Azure/AWS

tasks.notes: Google Cloud was specifically searched for but no documented partnership was found -- intentionally omitted rather than padded in.
